---
applyTo: "**"
---
# General Engineering Rules

- Prefer clarity over cleverness.
- Keep functions/classes focused and small.
- Use descriptive naming and explicit boundaries.
- Avoid dead code, TODO placeholders, and speculative abstractions.
- Do not introduce new dependencies unless justified.
- Keep PR-sized changes: focused and easy to review.

## Validation

- Run the smallest relevant checks first, then broader checks.
- If checks fail, report exact command and actionable fix path.
- Do not claim success without verification.
